chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 763 - وَ سَأَلَهُ: عَنِ اَلصَّلاَةِ عَلَى اَلْحَشِيشِ اَلنَّابِتِ أَوِ اَلثَّيِّلِ وَ هُوَ يُصِيبُ أَرْضاً جَدَداً قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.763 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about praying on growing grass or lush greenery that covers fresh ground.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm."
